case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,099.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
